name: Brick Skin
description: Any Shield you gain is increased by 2.
description2: Any Shield you gain is increased by 2.

name: Cobra Style
description: When an enemy moves into an adjacent tile, perform a weak melee attack on it.
description2: When an enemy moves into an adjacent tile, perform a weak melee attack on it, twice!

name: Counter Barrage
description: When you take damage from an enemy attack, gain +1 Bonus Attack.
description2: When you take damage from an enemy attack, gain +1 Bonus Attack and +1 Bonus Move.

name: Dancing Lights
description: When you switch stances, for each empty armor slot, emit a Sparkle. If all slots are empty gain +1 to a random stat.
description2: When you switch stances, for each empty armor slot, emit a Sparkle. If all slots are empty gain +1 to a random stat. While all armor slots are empty, you have +1 Magic Damage.

name: Energy Fists
description: Emit a Sparkle when you use your basic attack.
description2: Emit two Sparkles when you use your basic attack.

name: Flow State
description: When you deal damage to another unit, gain +1 Strength and +2 Dexterity until the end of the turn.
description2: When you deal damage to another unit, gain +2 Strength, +2 Dexterity, and +2 Luck until the end of the turn.

name: Harden
description: When you gain Shield, also gain temporary Brace 1.
description2: When you gain Shield, also gain temporary Brace 1. Gain +1 Shield when you hit a unit with your basic attack.

name: Iron Skin Technique
description: Gain +2 Shield when you land a critical hit. +10% critical chance.
description2: Gain +3 Shield when you land a critical hit. +25% critical chance.

name: Jagged Edges
description: When you lose Shield, gain +1 Thorns.
description2: When you lose Shield, gain that many Thorns.

name: Jet Fists
description: Your melee attacks and abilities blow wind through the tiles they hit.
description2: Your melee attacks and abilities blow wind through the tiles they hit in a large cone.

name: Long Arms
description: +1 Range and +1 Reach.
description2: +2 Strength, +2 Dexterity, +1 Range and +1 Reach.

name: Mind Breaker
description: Your basic attack inflicts Magic Weakness 1.
description2: Your basic attack inflicts Magic Weakness 2.

name: Mixup
description: When you switch stances, your next basic attack this turn is critical.
description2: When you switch stances, your next basic attack this turn is critical. Critical hits you land inflict Confusion 1.

name: Monkey Style
description: 15% chance to block damage and counter-attack.
description2: 33% chance to block damage and counter-attack.

name: Perfect Technique
description: While in ranged stance, You have +1 Range and +2 Magic Damage. While in melee stance, you have +1 Brace.
description2: While in ranged stance, You have +1 Range, +2 Kinetic Spikes, and +2 Magic Damage. While in melee stance, you have +2 Brace and +2 Health Regeneration.

name: Rapid Flow
description: When you switch stances, do a spin attack that hits all adjacent units.
description2: When you switch stances, do a double spin attack that hits all adjacent units.

name: Running Jab
description: When you end your movement, automatically use your basic attack if an enemy is in range.
description2: When you end your movement, automatically use your basic attack if an enemy is in range. You can move an extra time each turn.

name: Safe Switching
description: When you switch stances, gain +2 Shield.
description2: When you switch stances, gain +3 Shield and cleanse one stack of a random debuff.

name: Spread the Pain
description: Deal 2 extra damage the first time you damage each unit each turn.
description2: Deal 2 extra damage with 100% crit chance the first time you damage each unit each turn.

name: Tenderize
description: Your basic melee attacks inflict Bruise 1.
description2: Your basic melee attacks inflict Bruise 1 and have a 15% chance to inflict Stun 1.

name: Turnabout
description: Your basic melee attacks inflict Confusion 1 and make units face away from you.
description2: Your basic melee attacks inflict Confusion 1, make units face away from you, and have a 20% chance to inflict Stun 1.

name: Unburdened Motion
description: +1 Speed and +10% Dodge Chance for each empty armor slot. If all of your armor slots are empty, you can use your movement action an extra time.
description2: +2 Speed and +15% Dodge Chance for each empty armor slot. If all of your armor slots are empty, you gain Flying and can use your movement action an extra time.

name: Unburdened Strikes
description: +10% critical hit chance and +25% critical hit damage for each empty armor slot. If all of your armor slots are empty, counter-attack whenever you get hit.
description2: +10% critical hit chance and +25% critical hit damage for each empty armor slot. If all of your armor slots are empty your critical hits inflict Bruise, and counter-attack whenever you get hit.

name: Unburdened Thoughts
description: +1 Intelligence and +1 Charisma for each empty armor slot. If all of your armor slots are empty, your spells cost 1 less mana.
description2: +1 Intelligence, +1 Charisma, and +1 Kinetic Spikes for each empty armor slot. If all of your armor slots are empty, you have +2 Magic Damage and your spells cost 1 less mana.

name: Unstoppable!
description: You're immune to knockback, Stun, Slow, and other mobility debuffs.
description2: You're immune to knockback and debuffs.
unlock: Complete The Boneyard with the Monk
